# Xperience Community: Compare

[![Nuget](https://img.shields.io/nuget/v/XperienceCommunity.Compare)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/XperienceCommunity.Compare#versions-body-tab)
[![CI: Build and Test](https://github.com/kentico-ericd/xperience-by-kentico-community-compare/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/kentico-ericd/xperience-by-kentico-community-compare/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![Kentico Labs](https://img.shields.io/badge/Kentico_Labs-grey?labelColor=orange&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)](https://github.com/Kentico/.github/blob/main/SUPPORT.md#labs-limited-support)

## Description

This integration adds a new **Compare** tab to web pages and content items, allowing users to view the differences between two versions of the current item. For example, you can compare the current Draft of an item to its Published version and view what fields and widgets have been updated, before approving the changes.

## Library Version Matrix

| Xperience Version | Library Version |
| ----------------- | --------------- |
| >= 31.5.0         | >= 1.0.0        |

## Package Installation

Add the package to your application using the .NET CLI

```powershell
dotnet add package XperienceCommunity.Compare
```

## Quick Start

Add the following to your application's startup code:

```cs
builder.Services.AddXperienceCompare();
```

## Full Instructions

View the [Usage Guide](./docs/Usage-Guide.md) for more detailed instructions.
